title: Lumu's Artifacts
description: This datapack adds 15 new Artifacts that spice up gameplay by making some gamerules and world configuration commands a part of survival gameplay
body:
This datapack adds 15 Artifacts that make some commands and gamerules part of survival gameplay.

_Textures are placeholders_

_**Requires the resourcepack to see the items correctly**_

**SPECIAL THANKS TO HeDeAn( [https://modrinth.com/user/HeDeAnTheonlyone](https://modrinth.com/user/HeDeAnTheonlyone) ) FOR FIXING A LOT OF ISSUES,AND MAKING THE PACK WORK CORRECTLY.**
# Information
They way to get them is by crafting each of them, but as a trade off, they are very expensive to craft. And have negative effects each time they are used. 

**You can also use the command: /loot give @all loot artifacts:(item)**

There are more artifacts in the works with no release date yet.

Here is a full list and what each one does:


<details>
<summary>Difficulty Catalysts</summary>


Each of these catalysts change game difficulty, in their respective order;peaceful,easy,normal and hard (Harmony,Serene,Balance,Anguish)

![Difficulty catalysts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f4b8a45fd7ac13e1aef67f276eff32a4d0a0742.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Time Crystals</summary>

These crystals change the world time to day/night. (Day Crystal, Night Crystal)

![Time Crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13a3a520ee072e2a15c49883cae6bf61dea4e6f3.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Weather Crystals</summary>

These crystals change the world weather to sunny/thunder (Sunny Crystal, Thunder Crystal)

![Weather Crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca5f346ec233685fb5babfdc3be75c0ad11e70fb.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Hardmode Skulls</summary>

These skulls disable/enable natural regeneration. (Hardmode Skull, Bliss Skull)

![Hardmode Skulls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4561d70df2136d92cdf1f2457cf05411e10b7ad.webp)

</details>


<details>
  
<summary>Soul Keeper's Charm & Bloodmask </summary>

These artifacts enable/disable keep inventory (Soul Keeper's Charm,Bloodmask)

![Soul charms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18690ac23ab98f27bac27c2485082e7eb9840168.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Time stop catalysts</summary>

This catalysts stop/resume time (Chronovoid Catalyst,Chrono Catalyst)

![time stop catalysts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7e6025cbf824e79a6681fc90267d22822a0ff8d.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Healing Wand</summary>

Summons a small area to heal players. Currently not craftable

![Healing Wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbbed66b951b04a1f229da6ce78034e788489266.webp)
</details>
